records.ety: [L. transmigrare, transmigratum; trans across + migrare to migrate. See Migrate.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Transmigrated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Transmigrating.]

defs: To pass from one country or jurisdiction to another for the purpose of residence, as men or families; to migrate.
To pass from one body or condition into another.
quotes: Their may transmigrate into each other.
